region.feature1Desc: Region with the cleanest coves and beaches of the Mediterranean

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our experienced team connecting you with the most beautiful villas in Kaş and Kalkan

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Founded in Kaş in 2015, our company transformed into the most trusted villa rental platform in the region within 10 years. With over 200 premium villas, 5000+ happy guests and numerous awards, we redefined villa holidays.

values.title: Our Values
values.trustDesc: Every villa is personally inspected, every information verified
values.qualityDesc: Only the highest standard villas are in our portfolio
values.serviceDesc: 24/7 support in Turkish, English and Russian
